concepts.label: Arcane Gift
aliases: The talent for magic is awake in you.
concepts.definition: Grants the in-world basis for Spellcraft checks (without it, casting is a non-move).

concepts.label: Capability Basis
concepts.definition: The frozen capability basis dice or eligibility mechanic.

concepts.label: Edge
concepts.definition: The frozen edge dice or eligibility mechanic.

concepts.label: Second-Chance Die
concepts.definition: The frozen second-chance die dice or eligibility mechanic.

concepts.label: Keen Senses
aliases: You notice what others miss — a second look you always get.
concepts.definition: Advantage on Perception: roll an extra die and keep the best. Steady, not flashy.

concepts.label: Flat Modifier
concepts.definition: The frozen flat modifier dice or eligibility mechanic.

concepts.label: Power Strike
aliases: A committed heavy blow that trades all guard for devastating force.
concepts.definition: Spend 2 stamina: +3 to one melee check AND lift its ceiling — a big, risky swing.

concepts.label: Reroll
concepts.definition: The frozen reroll dice or eligibility mechanic.

concepts.label: Second Wind
aliases: When a blow goes wide, you dig deep and find one more try in you.
concepts.definition: On a FAILED check, spend 2 stamina to roll an extra die and keep the best — a second chance.

concepts.label: Silver Tongue
concepts.definition: The humble tier: a flat +1 to Persuasion checks, always on.

concepts.label: Steady Hand
aliases: Your aim does not waver; the shot never betrays you.
concepts.definition: Guard on Archery: you cannot critically fumble a shot (a crit-miss becomes a miss).

concepts.label: Surge
concepts.definition: The frozen surge dice or eligibility mechanic.

concepts.label: Ward Floor
concepts.definition: The frozen ward floor dice or eligibility mechanic.

concepts.label: Avatar Desynchronization
concepts.definition: An avatar's represented state diverges from authoritative state.

concepts.label: Compromised
concepts.definition: Recognized compromised state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Concealed
concepts.definition: Recognized concealed state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Contaminated
concepts.definition: A person, object, or place carries hazardous material without asserting biological infection.

concepts.label: Corrupted
concepts.definition: Recognized corrupted state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Decompression
concepts.definition: Recognized decompression state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Dehydrated
concepts.definition: Recognized dehydrated state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Dishonored
concepts.definition: A recognized social state of lost honor or standing, without implying a combat penalty.

concepts.label: Disease Exposure
concepts.definition: Contact with a pathogen without asserting infection or infectiousness.

concepts.label: Flooding
concepts.definition: Water is accumulating within a vessel or occupied space and requires damage control.

concepts.label: Frenzy
concepts.definition: Recognized frenzy state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Grappled
concepts.definition: Recognized grappled state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Haunted
concepts.definition: Recognized haunted state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Heatstroke
concepts.definition: Recognized heatstroke state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Hypothermia
concepts.definition: Recognized hypothermia state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Incubating Infection
concepts.definition: An infection exists in an incubation phase; contagiousness remains a separate fact.

concepts.label: Infected
concepts.definition: Recognized infected state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Infection Protection
concepts.definition: Protection against infection from vaccination, prophylaxis, or a setting-defined equivalent; not recovery from illness.

concepts.label: Infectious
concepts.definition: A person or source can transmit an infection.

concepts.label: Invisible
concepts.definition: Recognized invisible state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Life-Support Failure
concepts.definition: Failure of a system that maintains a habitable environment.

concepts.label: Lycanthropy
concepts.definition: Recognized lycanthropy state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Marked
concepts.definition: Recognized marked state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Mental Stress
concepts.definition: Recognized mental stress state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Network Lag
concepts.definition: Delayed communication between client and host, distinct from disconnection or server-state divergence.

concepts.label: Oxygen Deprivation
concepts.definition: Recognized oxygen deprivation state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Panic
concepts.definition: An acute loss of composure, distinct from accumulated stress, fear status, and lasting trauma.

concepts.label: Possessed
concepts.definition: Recognized possessed state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Prone
concepts.definition: Recognized prone state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Persistent Meridian Deviation
concepts.definition: Recognized persistent meridian deviation state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Radiation Sickness
concepts.definition: Recognized radiation sickness state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Ritual Impurity
concepts.definition: A tradition-defined ritual state, distinct from ordinary dirt, infection, and an automatically executable curse.

concepts.label: School Discipline
concepts.definition: An institutional disciplinary state imposed by a school or academy.

concepts.label: Server Fault
concepts.definition: A host or server is malfunctioning, distinct from an avatar or account condition.

concepts.label: Session Disconnected
concepts.definition: A client session has lost its connection without asserting account compromise.

concepts.label: Silenced
concepts.definition: Recognized silenced state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Suppressed
concepts.definition: Recognized suppressed state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Trauma
concepts.definition: A lasting consequence of overwhelming experience, distinct from immediate panic or a stress meter.

concepts.label: Vacuum Exposure
concepts.definition: Direct environmental exposure to vacuum, distinct from decompression and resulting hypoxia.

concepts.label: Vampirism
concepts.definition: Recognized vampirism state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Vehicle Disabled
concepts.definition: A vehicle cannot perform normal movement until its disabling fault is resolved.

concepts.label: Wanted
concepts.definition: Recognized wanted state; execution requires a matching receipt.

concepts.label: Committed Strike
aliases: Greater harm with an accuracy, mobility, or timing cost
concepts.definition: Greater harm with an accuracy, mobility, or timing cost

concepts.label: Conceal Ambush
aliases: Delay detection or gain first-action advantage
concepts.definition: Delay detection or gain first-action advantage

concepts.label: Defense Breach
aliases: Reduce or bypass armor after setup
concepts.definition: Reduce or bypass armor after setup

concepts.label: Delayed Impact
aliases: Telegraph now and resolve later at high potency
concepts.definition: Telegraph now and resolve later at high potency

concepts.label: Deploy
aliases: Add a subordinate, device, or temporary hazard
concepts.definition: Add a subordinate, device, or temporary hazard

concepts.label: Direct Pressure
concepts.definition: Immediate single-target harm

concepts.label: Displacement
aliases: Push, pull, knock down, or separate
concepts.definition: Push, pull, knock down, or separate

concepts.label: Disrupt
aliases: Disable a move, item, channel, or concentration
concepts.definition: Disable a move, item, channel, or concentration

concepts.label: Guard Barrier
aliases: Reduce harm to self, ally, or position
concepts.definition: Reduce harm to self, ally, or position

concepts.label: Impairment
aliases: Reduce perception, accuracy, coordination, or resolve
concepts.definition: Reduce perception, accuracy, coordination, or resolve

concepts.label: Mark Escalate
aliases: Focus a target or increase danger over time
concepts.definition: Focus a target or increase danger over time

concepts.label: Persistent Exposure
concepts.definition: Repeating harm until countered

concepts.label: Reactive Defense
aliases: Trigger after or against an incoming action
concepts.definition: Trigger after or against an incoming action

concepts.label: Reposition
aliases: Change range, elevation, flank, or engagement
concepts.definition: Change range, elevation, flank, or engagement

concepts.label: Restraint
aliases: Prevent or tax movement or actions
concepts.definition: Prevent or tax movement or actions

concepts.label: Sustain
concepts.definition: Heal, repair, regenerate, or drain

concepts.label: Sweep Burst
aliases: Affect multiple targets at reduced precision
concepts.definition: Affect multiple targets at reduced precision

concepts.label: Zone Denial
aliases: Make an area dangerous or costly to cross
concepts.definition: Make an area dangerous or costly to cross

concepts.label: Account Identity
concepts.definition: The host-level account that owns access and permissions, distinct from an in-world avatar.

concepts.label: Avatar Identity
concepts.definition: An in-world represented actor controlled through an account.

concepts.label: System Identity
concepts.definition: The hosting system or service, distinct from account and avatar actors.

concepts.label: Afflict
concepts.definition: Apply persistent harm or a condition.

concepts.label: Breach
concepts.definition: Defeat a protection or capability.

concepts.label: Deploy
concepts.definition: Add an actor, device, trap, or temporary hazard.

concepts.label: Displace
concepts.definition: Change position or posture.

concepts.label: Empower
concepts.definition: Improve an ally or expose/weaken a target for allies.

concepts.label: Guard
concepts.definition: Prevent, redirect, or answer harm.

concepts.label: Information
concepts.definition: Change what can be perceived or targeted.

concepts.label: Objective
concepts.definition: Pursue a non-damage encounter goal.

concepts.label: Prepare
concepts.definition: Telegraph and set up a stronger later effect.

concepts.label: Recover
concepts.definition: Restore or preserve capacity.

concepts.label: Restrain
concepts.definition: Deny or constrain action or movement.

concepts.label: Strike
concepts.definition: Immediate damage or wounds.

concepts.label: Transform
concepts.definition: Change form, phase, stance, or operating mode.

concepts.label: Traverse
concepts.definition: Gain positional advantage.

concepts.label: Zone
concepts.definition: Create or alter dangerous space.

concepts.label: Relationship Standing
concepts.definition: Tracked closeness, trust, rivalry, or estrangement between specific actors; not a fungible currency.

concepts.label: Academic Progress
concepts.definition: Tracked progress through a course, term, rank, or graduation requirement.

concepts.label: Ammunition
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed ammunition capacity.

concepts.label: Authority
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed authority capacity.

concepts.label: Bandwidth
concepts.definition: Available communication or transfer capacity.

concepts.label: Blood Reserve
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed blood reserve capacity.

concepts.label: Blood Hunger
concepts.definition: A vampiric need to feed, distinct from stored blood and ordinary food hunger.

concepts.label: Boiler Pressure
concepts.definition: Exhaustible pressure available to a steam-driven machine, distinct from thermal heat.

concepts.label: Charges
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed charges capacity.

concepts.label: Cooldown
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed cooldown capacity.

concepts.label: Currency
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed currency capacity.

concepts.label: Debt and Obligation
concepts.definition: A specific outstanding debt, favor, oath, or obligation; separate from cash, reputation, authority, and favor.

concepts.label: Divine Favor
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed divine favor capacity.

concepts.label: Evidence
concepts.definition: Collected and retained support for an investigation or accusation.

concepts.label: Experience
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed experience capacity.

concepts.label: Fuel
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed fuel capacity.

concepts.label: Heat
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed heat capacity.

concepts.label: Honor
concepts.definition: Setting-defined personal or institutional honor, separate from generic reputation.

concepts.label: Health
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed health capacity.

concepts.label: Hunger
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed hunger capacity.

concepts.label: Infection Load
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed infection load capacity.

concepts.label: Law Heat
concepts.definition: Accumulating attention from police, corporate security, hunters, or another pursuing authority; not thermal heat.

concepts.label: Legitimacy
concepts.definition: Recognized right of a person or institution to govern; not automatic obedience.

concepts.label: Mana
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed mana capacity.

concepts.label: Morale
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed morale capacity.

concepts.label: Oxygen
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed oxygen capacity.

concepts.label: Patron Favor
concepts.definition: Standing or credit with a specific patron, without assuming celestial or infernal polarity.

concepts.label: Processing Memory
concepts.definition: Available computational working memory, distinct from stored charges.

concepts.label: Public Confidence
concepts.definition: Population-scale confidence in a polity or institution, distinct from an actor being inspired.

concepts.label: Qi
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed qi capacity.

concepts.label: Radiation Dose
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed radiation dose capacity.

concepts.label: Rage
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed rage capacity.

concepts.label: Reputation
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed reputation capacity.

concepts.label: Mental Stability
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed mental stability capacity.

concepts.label: Shield Capacity
concepts.definition: Remaining capacity of a defensive field or screen.

concepts.label: Ship Power
concepts.definition: Power available for allocation among a vessel's systems.

concepts.label: Stamina
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed stamina capacity.

concepts.label: Supplies
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed supplies capacity.

concepts.label: Thirst
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed thirst capacity.

concepts.label: Threat
concepts.definition: Accumulated hostile attention toward an avatar or actor.

concepts.label: Time
concepts.definition: Tracked or proposed time capacity.

concepts.label: Vehicle Integrity
concepts.definition: Tracked structural capacity of a vehicle or vessel.

concepts.label: Academics
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for academics; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Archery
concepts.definition: Accuracy with ranged weapons.

concepts.label: Athletics
concepts.definition: Feats of body and motion.

concepts.label: Brawl
concepts.definition: Fighting up close — fists, improvised weapons, or a blade in a pinch.

concepts.label: Command
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for command; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Crafting
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for crafting; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Cultivation
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for cultivation; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Deception
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for deception; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Diplomacy
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for diplomacy; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Engineering
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for engineering; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Hacking
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for hacking; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Horsemanship
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for horsemanship; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Intimidation
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for intimidation; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Investigation
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for investigation; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Lockpicking
concepts.definition: Opening stubborn locks.

concepts.label: Lore
concepts.definition: Knowledge of history, arcana, and the world.

concepts.label: Medicine
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for medicine; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Navigation
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for navigation; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Perception
concepts.definition: Noticing what others miss.

concepts.label: Performance
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for performance; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Persuasion
concepts.definition: Winning people over with words.

concepts.label: Piloting
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for piloting; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Ritual Practice
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for ritual practice; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Scavenging
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for scavenging; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Seafaring
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for seafaring; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Spellcraft
concepts.definition: Shaping magic. Requires the Arcane Gift — you cannot declare power; you acquire it.

concepts.label: Stealth
concepts.definition: Avoiding detection.

concepts.label: Survival
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for survival; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Swordplay
concepts.definition: Fighting with blades.

concepts.label: Tactics
concepts.definition: A recognition domain for tactics; a custom runtime definition still needs mechanics.

concepts.label: Backlash
concepts.definition: Power reached past mastery and bit back — burnout, recoil, wild energy.

concepts.label: Battered
concepts.definition: Beaten down and barely patched up; defeat lingers in every movement.

concepts.label: Bleeding
concepts.definition: An open wound; blood loss saps every effort.

concepts.label: Blessed
concepts.definition: Favored by something greater.

concepts.label: Blinded
concepts.definition: Sight lost or fouled.

concepts.label: Burning
concepts.definition: On fire — pain and panic.

concepts.label: Charmed
concepts.definition: Judgment bent by magic or wiles.

concepts.label: Chilled
concepts.definition: Numbing cold slows muscle and mind.

concepts.label: Cursed
concepts.definition: Marked by malign power; misfortune follows.

concepts.label: Diseased
concepts.definition: Sickness has taken hold.

concepts.label: Drunk
concepts.definition: In their cups — loose-tongued and unsteady.

concepts.label: Empowered
concepts.definition: Surging with borrowed strength.

concepts.label: Entangled
concepts.definition: Snared by webs, vines, or rope.

concepts.label: Exhausted
concepts.definition: Run past the body's limits.

concepts.label: Hasted
concepts.definition: Supernaturally quick.

concepts.label: Inspired
concepts.definition: Heart lifted; hands steady.

concepts.label: Poisoned
concepts.definition: Venom works through the body.

concepts.label: Pregnant
concepts.definition: Carrying a child. Valence is theirs to define — a blessing, a burden, or simply a fact.

concepts.label: Regenerating
concepts.definition: Wounds knit closed on their own.

concepts.label: Shielded
concepts.definition: Warded against harm.

concepts.label: Slowed
concepts.definition: Limbs drag as if through water.

concepts.label: Starving
concepts.definition: Days without food.

concepts.label: Strained
concepts.definition: A critical failure left its mark — pulled muscle, rattled nerve, shaken focus.

concepts.label: Stunned
concepts.definition: Reeling; barely able to act.

concepts.label: Terrified
concepts.definition: Fear rules them.

concepts.label: Weakened
concepts.definition: Strength drained away.

concepts.label: Aggro Rule
concepts.definition: A world-system rule governing how hostile actors acquire targets; not literal zone denial.

concepts.label: Doom Clock
concepts.definition: Tracked escalation toward a world or encounter consequence; not an objective by itself.

concepts.label: Effect Polarity Rule
concepts.definition: A world law defining how opposed supernatural polarities interact.

concepts.label: Permadeath Rule
concepts.definition: A world rule that determines whether defeat permanently ends an avatar or character.

concepts.label: Timeline Divergence
concepts.definition: A committed world fact identifying where and how a historical timeline departed from another account.

concepts.label: Weakness Rule
concepts.definition: A setting-defined vulnerability; genre or species labels alone do not grant it.
